details.IncidentDetail: "[31] 42-3 BACK AT 1020 - ROAD IS PASSABLE - LOW HANGING WIRE THAT SHOULD NOT BE HIT BY ANY PASSING VEHS - LINES DOWN ON THE SOUTH SIDE OF IDAHO MARYLAND - BTWN ARAGON WAY AND ST LEDGER FOREST THERE IS A POLE DOWN INTO LINES - HAVE CORDS RESP FOR CLEAN UP AND PGE RESP FOR POWER LINE CONCERNS "
"[30] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from 1125-Traffic Hazard to CLOSURE-Closure of a Road by CHP"
"[29] B42-011 CORDS 97 - SPOKE TO PGE // UNK ETA // CONDITIONS UNAFE TO WORK IN UNK WHEN THEY WILL GET TO IT"
"[28] 42-18 - RELIEVED BY CORDS ON 18 SIDE OF CLOSURE // ADVISE 42-11 ANOTHER CORDS EMPLOYEE ENRT NOW TO RELIEVE 11 // 11 CPZ"
"[26] [Notification] [CHP]-NCSO LL - 2 TKS ON WAY // 1 HAD EQUIPMENT FAILURE // HAD TO GET DIFFERENT TK - SHOULD BE 97 SHORTLY // BOTTOM HALF SHOULD BE CLOSED"
"[25] 1039 NCSO - STATED AT LINE 22 - CORDS WERE LOADING UP STUFF AND ENRT / WILL CB W/ ETA"
"[24] 42-11 VIA MDC MSG REQ ETA FROM CORDS"
"[21] 1039 NCSO - WILL CB WITH ETA ON CORDS "
"[20] 42-S3 VIA LL CORDS NEED TO COME OUT TONIGHT/AREA UNSAFE/ REQ ETA"
"[18] 1039 NCSO FOR CORDS - CPZ LINE LINE 15 / 17"
"[15] 42-18 - PGE REQ TO INFORM CORDS IDAHO MARYLAND X BANNER LAVA CAP HARD CLOSURE - MULT POLES COMPRAMIZED "
"[13] REPORTS FROM PASSING MOTORISTS OF MORE POWER LINES/TREES DOWN ON IDAHO MARYLAND BETWEEN BRUNSWICK AND BANNER LAVA CAP. WOULD PGE LIKE A HARD CLOSURE OF THE AREA TO ASSESS/WORK? THANK YOU"

"[12] 42-11 VIA MDC CAN YOU CHECK WITH PGE AND SEE IF POWER IS SHUT DOWN IN THE AREA? IM DIVERTING TRAFFIC AT ID MRYLND/BLC BUT TRAFFIC IS STILL COMING UP ID MRYLAND GOING UNDERNEATH THE TREE/POWER LINES"
"[10] 1039 PGE - STILL SHOWING PGE 97 / HAS MULT CALLS ITA IDAHO MARYLAND X LEE"
"[9] 42-11 VIA MDC - HAD TO GO GO BACK UP HILL TO HELP TURN TRAFFIC AROUND, CAME BACK AND PGE NO LONGER 97, DOES NOT LOOK LIKE ANYTHING HAS BEEN DONE TO ALLEVIATE ISSUE. CAN YOU GO LL PLEASE"
"[1] TREE DOWN 1125 ALL LANES // POWER LINE UNDER TREE // NEG SPARKING SEEN"
"[28] [Notification] [CHP]-PGE LL - ETA IS FEB 22ND - UNK TIME "
"[27] PER PG/E -THEY HAVE THIS AT PACIFIC HOUSE - WILL RECALL W/ UPDATE IF CLOSURE CREW IS 1097"
"[24] REQ FM 44-110 TASK .428 H,PLS GET UPDATE STATUS CLOSURE FM PGandE"
"[21] [Notification] [CHP]-PGandE NEG ETA /ADV THEY DIDNT HAVE THE CALL FOR LINES DOWN WORKING ON GETTING DISPATCHED OUT /SENDING REPORT"

"[13] [Appended, 07:57:18] [1] [07:42:22 GMT-08:00 20 Feb 2026] (310) 694-7292 has entered the chat[07:42:22 GMT-08:00 20 Feb 2026] (310) 694-7292: A user is requesting emergency services from an Apple device via satellite. Transmit and receive times may be longer than for cellular SMS. User responses may be delayed due to satellite movements.The user CANNOT MAKE OR RECEIVE A VOICE CALL because they are outside cellular coverage.The user has requested that Apple share messages in this conversation with one or more of their emergency contacts. Any text sent or received may be visible to the identified contact(s).[07:42:22 GMT-08:00 20 Feb 2026] (310) 694-7292: At 03:42PM UTC, ALBERTO DIAZ requested emergency services near these coordinates: Latitude 34.5846 (N), Longitude -118.3074 (W).Responders may need to search an area extending at least 10 meters in all directions for a 95% chance of finding the user.The user's estimated altitude (HAE) is 1053 meters. Responders may need to search 10 meters above and below this level for a 95% chance of finding the user.The user has cached Enhanced Emergency Data with Apple. Their verified phone number is +13106947292.The user requests help with a CAR OR VEHICLE ISSUE emergency.This request is for SOMEONE ELSE.The specific emergency is VEHICLE CRASH.NO ONE is trapped.The person in need IS injured.The user's iPhone has its region set to UNITED STATES. The user's iPhone has its default language set to ENGLISH.TCC or PSAP systems may garble this language's script. Return messages to the user will not be garbled.[07:42:22 GMT-08:00 20 Feb 2026] (310) 694-7292: This concludes the initial data.
